name: html-css-layout
scope: Plain HTML and CSS primitives that complement DevExtreme jQuery widgets

primitives.name: css-grid-shell
primitives.purpose: Create a stable application shell with header, content, and optional footer rows.

primitives.name: scroll-region
primitives.purpose: Allow inner content to scroll without resizing the full page.

primitives.name: sticky-region
primitives.purpose: Keep local headers or toolbars visible within a scroll context.

validationRules: Use min-height: 0 on grid or flex children that contain scrollable widgets.
Do not force DevExtreme internals to become layout containers when a wrapper can own layout.

primitives.name: responsive-grid
primitives.purpose: Create responsive summary or supporting content regions.

primitives.name: flex-toolbar-wrapper
primitives.purpose: Arrange non-widget layout around DevExtreme controls.

primitives.name: container-bounds
primitives.purpose: Prevent long text or controls from overflowing their parent.

validationRules: Prefer DevExtreme widget responsive options for widget internals.
Use CSS wrappers for page composition and spacing.

primitives.name: css-variables
primitives.purpose: Centralize local app colors, spacing, radius, and elevation.

primitives.name: scoped-widget-selectors
primitives.purpose: Style DevExtreme widgets without global overrides.

primitives.name: template-classes
primitives.purpose: Style custom HTML emitted from item templates and cell templates.

validationRules: Avoid broad global .dx-* selectors unless the rule is intentionally app-wide.
